column1: How stories were scored (v2 — full text)

This ranking is built from the FULL TEXT of every story in your Claude data export (85 stories found across 66 chats — far more than the ~30 first assumed). An automated pass scored language signals; then the top ~42 plus all previously-known stories were reviewed by hand and their scores corrected. The 'Reviewed' column shows which were human-checked (✓) vs automated-only (confirm on a read). Weights follow your priority order.

column3: Clear repeatable life lessons woven into the action.
A real feeling handled with care a 5yo recognises.
Will they ask for it again — hooks, sound, humour.
Felix acts/Alex notices distinct; sad-before-bad villain; clean shape; cast ≤6.
Reads aloud well, no visuals; not bogged in free-verse.
